reasoning: This animation sequence will depict a robot mimicking a crocodile's predatory stalking. The movement will be slow and deliberate, focusing on the arms' position to suggest a low, creeping stance. The robot's arms will start in a neutral position and then gradually transition to a low, wide stance, simulating the reptile's body posture. The animation will then show a sudden strike, followed by a return to the neutral position. This combines the slow, creeping motion of a crocodile with a sudden, powerful attack. The use of subtle micro-movements will enhance the realism of the motion, creating a more dynamic and expressive sequence. Frame 1: Neutral. Frame 2: Low, wide stance. Frame 3: Strike pose. Frame 4: Return to neutral.
